chinese-herbal-medicine-visual-guide.description: Generate a 4K vertical 'Herb Exploded Sheet' infographic poster for a single Chinese herb with labeled parts, properties, and modern forms.

evolution-timelines-visualization.description: Create an isometric pixel-art 'evolution museum' timeline scene that maps time progression to spatial progression with bilingual titles.

chinese-costume-history-infographic.description: Draw a cute hand-drawn travel map with daily route blocks, landmarks, food, lodging, and transport labeled in Simplified Chinese.

ai-collage-digital-wallpaper-guide-lifes.description: Photorealistic 3x3 lifestyle photo collage with consistent palette and golden-hour lighting — close-ups, full-body shots, candid moments, and detail shots in one aesthetic.

ai-collage-digital-wallpaper-guide-9trai.description: 3x3 personality / trait infographic showing nine visual variations of a single theme with consistent style and color palette across cells.

ai-collage-digital-wallpaper-guide-fando.description: Multi-cell fandom poster pulling together iconic characters from a single universe in a unified grid layout — anime protagonists, superheroes, K-pop lineups, and more.

character-prompt-generator-custom-card.description: Build a fully custom character card from scratch — enter personality (MBTI, traits), name, gender, archetype, and get a polished profile card with portrait and stat panel.

character-prompt-generator-kawaii-profil.description: Cartoon-style character profile card in kawaii aesthetic — enter name, age, gender, archetype to generate a cute illustrated profile sheet.

character-prompt-generator-fandom-grid.description: Multi-character grid poster organized around a fandom — anime protagonists, superheroes, K-pop groups, classic TV casts — with consistent lighting and pose direction.

character-prompt-generator-marvel-mbti.description: Generate an MBTI character analysis card for any Marvel hero or villain — personality type, strengths, weaknesses, and a hand-drawn isometric room scene that fits the character.

character-prompt-generator-breakingbad-m.description: Breaking Bad / Better Call Saul character MBTI card — personality breakdown plus an isometric scene styled to the show's visual language.

character-prompt-generator-harry-potter-.description: Harry Potter universe MBTI character infographic — wizard-aesthetic personality card with type, traits, and signature scene.

character-prompt-generator-friends-mbti.description: Friends TV show MBTI character card — personality breakdown of each cast member with sitcom-styled illustration.

10-prompting-tips-nano-banana-mbti.description: MBTI character card with a Marvel-styled isometric room scene. One parameter: a character name like Hulk, Iron Man, Doctor Strange.

10-prompting-tips-nano-banana-recipe.description: Editorial-style recipe card infographic. Concrete recipe names (with ingredients implied) produce much better results than category words.

10-prompting-tips-nano-banana-vocab.description: Vocabulary cluster poster grouping related words by theme — works well for language-learning content. Try themes like 'animals', 'kitchen tools', 'weather phenomena'.

10-prompting-tips-nano-banana-watercolor.description: Watercolor painting tutorial poster with stepwise guidance. Specific subjects (butterfly, magnolia, koi fish) produce better results than abstract ones (nature, flower).

10-prompting-tips-nano-banana-fandom.description: Multi-character poster organized around a fandom theme. Strong themes ('K-pop boy group', 'NBA legends') outperform weak ones ('characters').

mbti-character-generator-universe-marvel.description: Marvel hero or villain as an MBTI personality card with isometric room scene.

mbti-character-generator-universe-breaki.description: Breaking Bad / Better Call Saul character MBTI card styled to the show's visual language.

mbti-character-generator-universe-nba.description: NBA player MBTI card with on-court vibes — Curry, KD, Kobe, Tim Duncan, etc.

mbti-character-generator-universe-naruto.description: Naruto-universe character MBTI card with anime-styled illustration.

mbti-character-generator-universe-ghibli.description: Studio Ghibli protagonist as an MBTI personality card in Ghibli's painterly style.

mbti-character-generator-universe-yellow.description: Yellowstone character MBTI card — Beth, Rip, Kayce, John — with rugged Montana visual language.

mbti-character-generator-universe-silico.description: AI assistant or Silicon Valley tech character as an MBTI personality — ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, etc.

mbti-character-generator-universe-harry-.description: Harry Potter character MBTI infographic with wizarding-world visual cues.

mbti-character-generator-universe-friend.description: Friends sitcom cast MBTI card — Chandler, Ross, Rachel, Monica, Joey, Phoebe.

mbti-character-generator-universe-chines.description: Chinese classic literature character (Three Kingdoms, Dream of the Red Chamber, Journey to the West) as MBTI.

mbti-character-generator-universe-zhenhu.description: Empresses in the Palace (Zhenhuan) character MBTI analysis with Qing dynasty palace visuals.

mbti-character-generator-universe-prince.description: Princess Pearl (Huan Zhu Ge Ge) character MBTI card with classic C-drama palette.

mbti-character-generator-beyond-stereoty.description: Bust the common stereotypes for any MBTI type with a side-by-side 'what people think' vs 'what it actually is' infographic.

mbti-character-generator-beyond-relation.description: Compatibility infographic for any two MBTI types — strengths, friction points, and how they show up together.

mbti-character-generator-beyond-contrast.description: Side-by-side scene contrasting how two MBTI personas behave in the same situation — perfect for comedic 'them vs us' content.

sample_parameters.character_set: Kobe Bryant, Stephen Curry, Kevin Durant, Tim Duncan

mbti-character-generator-beyond-generic-.description: Multi-character MBTI grid for any theme — basketball legends, anime protagonists, classic novelists. Pick the theme and the cast.

mbti-character-generator-beyond-animal.description: 16 MBTI types as animals in a shared scene — amusement park, office, school. Whimsical and very shareable.
